zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Hawkins是Matthew Hawkins的兒子，於1517年出生在英國肯特布頓 武安德 布利安。他於1542年與Eleanor At-Sea在英國英格蘭肯特布頓 武安德 布利安結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1587年3月15日在英國肯特布頓-德-布利安享年70歲，埋葬在英國肯特布頓-德-布利安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Hawkins是Matthew Hawkins的儿子，于1517年出生在英国肯特布頓 武安德 布利安。他于1542年与Eleanor At-Sea在英国英格兰肯特布頓 武安德 布利安结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1587年3月15日在英国肯特布頓-德-布利安享年70岁，埋葬在英国肯特布頓-德-布利安。

nameMeanings.name: Hawkins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hawkin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name, with excrescent -s, from Hawkinge (Kent). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Heafoc or Old English heafoc ‘hawk’ + the placename forming suffix -ing. This name has been assimilated to the patronymic surname in Devon from Sir John Hawkyns (1532–95), victor against the Spanish Armada (1588), who was a member of the Devon family of Hawkins, a branch of a Kentish family from the village of Hawkinge. They held land in Plymouth as long ago as 1480.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Hawkins was born in 1517, in Boughton under Blean, Kent, England as the son of Matthew Hawkins. He married Eleanor At-Sea in 1542, in Boughton under Blean, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 15 March 1587, in Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Hawkins est né en 1517, à Boughton under Blean, Kent, Angleterre, fils de Matthew Hawkins. Il a épousé Eleanor At-Sea en 1542, à Boughton under Blean, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 15 mars 1587, à Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Hawkinsは1517年にイギリスケントボウトン ウンダー ブリーンでMatthew Hawkinsの息子として生まれた。1542年にイギリスイギリスケントボウトン ウンダー ブリーンでEleanor At-Seaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1587年3月15日にイギリスケントボウトン-ウンデル-ブリーンで70歳で死去し，イギリスケントボウトン-ウンデル-ブリーンにて埋葬された。

ko.Of,Boughton Under Blean,Kent,Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 부그h턴 운더 블리인
ko.Of Nashe,Boughton Under Blean,Kent,Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 부그h턴 운더 블리인
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Hawkins(은)는 1517년 영국 켄트 부그h턴 운더 블리인에서 Matthew Hawkins의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1542년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 부그h턴 운더 블리인에서 Eleanor At-Sea(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1587년 3월 15일 영국 켄트 부그h토-운더-블리인에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 부그h토-운더-블리인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Hawkins nasceu em 1517, em Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inglaterra filho de Matthew Hawkins. Ele casou-se com Eleanor At-Sea em 1542, em Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de março de 1587, em Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Hawkins родился в 1517 г. в местности боугтон ундир блян, кэнт, Англия. Его отца звали Matthew Hawkins. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor At-Sea в 1542 г. в местности боугтон ундир блян, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 15 марта 1587 г. в местности боугтон-ундир-блян, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности боугтон-ундир-блян, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con Eleanor At-Sea en 1542, en Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1587, en Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, Inglaterra.
